assertions.expectation: Recommends increasing maxSurge for CPU pools (e.g., 10-20) to parallelize node replacements, with justification for the value
assertions.reason: Recommends maxSurge=10 and 8 for CPU pools with justification of 5% of pool size, and explains this enables 5-10x faster upgrades

assertions.expectation: For GPU pools with fixed reservations: recommends increasing maxUnavailable (not maxSurge) as the primary lever since surge capacity is typically unavailable
assertions.reason: Explicitly identifies maxUnavailable=4 as the primary acceleration strategy for GPU pools with fixed reservations, explaining surge capacity isn't available

assertions.expectation: Advises checking and requesting increased compute quota before the upgrade for CPU pools
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or requesting increased compute quota - only discusses upgrade settings optimization

assertions.expectation: Suggests staggering node pool upgrades or running non-conflicting pools in parallel
assertions.reason: Provides detailed section on 'Parallel Node Pool Upgrades' with commands to run all pools simultaneously using --async flag

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE's auto-scale blue-green upgrade strategy as an option for GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes section on 'Autoscaled Blue-Green for GPU Pools' with specific gcloud command using --enable-blue-green-upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends
assertions.reason: Provides Option B for extending maintenance window with specific gcloud command for 12-hour window configuration

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for updating surge settings on each pool
assertions.reason: Includes specific gcloud container node-pools update commands with --max-surge-upgrade and --max-unavailable-upgrade flags for each pool type

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to track upgrade progress in real-time
assertions.reason: Provides watch command with 'gcloud container operations list' to monitor all operations in real-time
